---
title: "About"
---

Shih-Feng (Fredric) Huang, MD. Attending Colorectal Surgeon and surgical data scientist working at the intersection of robotic surgery, computer vision, and machine learning.

## Position

Attending Surgeon, Division of Colorectal Surgery, Department of Surgery  
Kaohsiung Veterans General Hospital, Taiwan (2019–present)

## Education

**PhD, Computer Science (Medical Informatics)** — National Cheng Kung University (2026–present)  
**MD** — National Defense Medical Center (2010–2017)

## Certifications

- da Vinci Surgical System (Intuitive Surgical) — certified console surgeon
- Python Certified Entry-Level Programmer (PCEP)
- Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate
- DataCamp Data Scientist Professional

## Research interests

Robotic total mesorectal excision · CT pelvimetry · Risk-adjusted CUSUM · Surgical phase recognition · Surgical Difficulty Index (SDI) · Anastomotic leak prediction · Machine learning learning curves

## Open source

- [`ctpelvimetry`](https://pypi.org/project/ctpelvimetry/) — automated CT-based pelvimetry (PyPI)
- [github.com/odafeng](https://github.com/odafeng) — clinical research code and tools

## Contact

[Email](mailto:drfredrichuang@gmail.com) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8037-4074) · [GitHub](https://github.com/odafeng) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fredrichuang/) · [shihfenghuang.com](https://shihfenghuang.com)
